headline: Duke Energy invests $600,000 to train North Carolina's future energy workforce
summary: The Duke Energy Foundation is investing $600,000 to strengthen North Carolina's energy workforce, including $500,000 for 20 North Carolina community colleges and $100,000 for two regional partners expanding access to high-demand training programs aligned with the energy sector.

headline: Duke Energy to hold annual shareholders meeting online May 7
summary: Duke Energy (NYSE: DUK) will hold its annual shareholders meeting online on Thursday, May 7, at 1 p.m. ET.

headline: AI Power Boom Is 'Accelerating' As Goldman Sachs Forecasts Data Center's Demand To Surge 220% By 2030
summary: Goldman Sachs forecasts global data center power demand will surge 220% by 2030. Discover how the accelerating AI boom impacts energy grids.
